message.body: Wolsk is now live! Streaming I Wanna Be the Guy: Cultured 2 Replay (Day 5) || maybe clear ??
have some confidence, definitely clear wolskAmazing
Howdy hi, figure is kicking my ass, but is fun riecheExplode
Super hard, but somehow is really fun to play
I'm playing that and divisive game, but figure caught me more
reverse gravity vines are such a cool mechanic
I'm trying to improve a little bit, and jumping into +65 +70 games, like explore the mountains, i wanna disconnect, and a few more, most fsr needle games
cleared secret 3 and got to 2nd screen of rz
the first save of the second screen is bad for me specifically
because io have some like psychosomatic inability to press 2 buttons on the same frame
my hands start like shaking when i need to
prehopping helps yes but i cant prehop when theres a spike one block above my head
Is this a jungle adventure screen?
i would like to fix it but idk how
the contrary k3 screen gave you bad align for two corners
lowk took 3x longer than the platforming in the actual game contrary
Lettuced subscribed at Tier 1. They've subscribed for 108 months! wolskArrive
it was just the bad align corner saves
contrary's platforming took me a bit over 10 minutes so
the idiots are being difficult about scheduling for the event
No I have no idea what this is
then again, I also wouldn’t want to play at 6 am
Dang, first 3 jumps and this sucks already
Earliest thing I remember is 100 keys or whatever that puzzle one is
is this a stonk buff screen
but i certainly do remember this from your first playthrough LUL
you should really use less bots
im actually a figment of your imagination wolsk, you gotta take your meds
there's gotta be a streamer out there that had their first chatter 10 years later
that's actually the majority of streamers apparently
and whats wrong with that sir?
I don't remember exactly if is the normal or biff version of this screen, but liquid rage was the happiest man alive after beating it
just tuning in now, what did the whale from sts do
every time I try and chat in twitch, a client calls
GL (not sure if an HF is likely here)
omg I thought it was good luck and high five
and here I thought I was commanding you
played some easy slop to procrastinate playing hard slop
the spikes are behind the tiling and the kid is front of the tiling, how does it kill

watched a group of people racing the demo of my steam game and chat was like "idk I thought it played exactly like some iwbtg fangames Ive played" "this feels like a iwbtg fangame just not with that engine"
I know a plane setup if you need it
my face watching this save fragnaWeird <--

i'll take it a step further and go with what a grade A bellend
I'm good! Hope the grind is going well!

they should do that but for a game that costs like $100

u think im a zoomer? thanks
anyone younger than a millennial is banned wolskStare

despite it raining all night and morning, my allergies are getting to me
blaming meowths for your human deficiencies SadCat
reminds me to buy more antihistamines
nah, I know what I want
does any fangame implement a per-save death counter?
is that a reverse spchinter on the left
i liek when u do the dabadadbadba sound
stop tracking your deaths and the placebo will work better
Oh wait, are in M for Mermaid Man or W for Wumbo
more insane than the tight timing jump after it?
the timer didn't start when you bhopped
mom hes playing the impossible game again
why would you put yourself through this twice
youre a beter man than me this is controller breaking difficulty
Breaking: Bad thing still bad even after many years wolskCola
see this is much better bullshit
ok the music kinda slaps for this level too
so you should be done when I'm back from coffee
we could still have been on boss 5
Werumy subscribed with Prime. They've subscribed for 58 months!
you can do this i have faith in youuu

you cant do this wolsk give up
wolsk you might be able to do it!
Well, at least this is the only life we get
k, we're going to the kitchen to make 2am breakfast. lets go.
considering im not entirely sure how you swap colors i csnt tell
how you from white background to black
yeah i dont see a reason for it
dunno if it's the alternating black and white but for some reason this is too much for my brain to process
if only someone who give him words of affirmation

i believe, 1 shot from here to the end after this death and possibly the next
i'm already reporting it don't worry
maybe my estimate was a bit off
why is there even a border
yet the floor doesn't have one
you could make those 8px a really stretched wolsk
i wonder whos words of encouragement mightve helped

Happy Birthday Wolsk! Did you really think I'd let you play these shitty fangames? I know the kind of games you vibe with, the kind that stays fun no matter what. So here's your gift, Cultured 2 wrapped in that same aura, play it any time. you know the rules, even if the needle never ends, we keep jumping!
nah lmfao i cleared rz and save 1+2 of guy tower but i had some major brain fog so im gonna chill here and eat
Barfyace watched 5 consecutive streams and sparked a watch streak! I got 5 on it.
ive been so bad at needle lately
im gonna stop watching if you do
give up wolsk the cheatless run is already over
He can't keep getting away with it!
this actually seems fun in a fucked up way
the only thing i remember is the upside down corner in the gravity flipper area
i forget what screen but it's like the last jump in the entire screen iirc

like sections that scream "how tf would you buff this" and then it's like "hold on check this out"

what was that water screen you were on? it looked super fire
most of stonks buffs are good
i havent seen all of them but
EW I JUST SAW THAT LAST JUMP

wait isnt that a softlock tho
i feel like if i made a game youd just softlock yourself
god imagine softlocking late into bifficult. I'd quit my entire fangame career right there lmao
i like that this game has stuff like that, crazy we dont got a 100% tas yet. there's so man insane skips in this game, now imagine what a tas could do

yeah it'd be so time consuming just trying to figure out which strats are technically faster and what not. though you could also do a bullshit tas where it just does the dumbest shit while not focusing too hard on clearing as fast as possible
can i send it here or nah
i was gonna say it doesnt seem too bad then i saw the tbone
so the solution here is to cry and lose
what would you say is your favorite bifficult screen?
So the trap is, that spikes from the right, hope that helps!
it would be truly bifficult if it took away your triple jump for the ceiling double diamond
k tore my 2am breakfast up im back now hi
my bacon and cream cheese bagels u said u wouldnt like
how long did the BS screen take you?
the music for this is so good vswedDance
Same, but replace cream cheese, with british people
had to show my gf that calypso video the other day
speaking of british people, i went down this european people (mostly brits) try american foods for the first time rabbit hole, and its the best thing ever.
watching the k3 ceiling jump tas
the kid being the best gradius pilot in the history of the universe
european tries malort for the first time
i watch the ones where they try actual meals. like tex mex or soul foods. and u can see literal tears form in their eyes
I sent you the calypso short, I feel like you wouldve seen this at some point
tears of joy yes. cus brits, no offense, have awful food culture
i mean in a general sense
thats the same with facebook market lol. they have some amazing cooks on there.
i think of it like this: yes, lots of brits eat flavorless trash constantly but go to extreme rural america where there's a pizza hut and a gas station and that's your food
i think i could do this too, but it'd def take me a moment
first save is actually really not that bad because some of the jumps are easily set-up
this second save is a little less so
the european reaction vids are all from major american cities so it's nothing like all the empty land rural america
I'm just really not that good with those whatever they're called. the jump on the far top right
im not saying brit has no good food at all. that'd be unrealistic. however, they're not well known for their multicultural foods like america is. that's all i was getting at.
and that i just enjoy watching the videos of their reactions lol
we do generally have an insane number of food types due to the immigrant friendly (until well y'know) nature of the US
the brits literally invaded the whole world to try and get better food PrideLaugh

fisting my bump reminds me of the masters of the universe movie

the jump sfx is so poppy on top of the music
